mapper.select: SELECT SP.SPRICE_ID, SP.SCHEDULE_ID, SP.TYPE_ID, SP.PRICE, SP.USE_YN, SP.REG_DT, TT.TYPE_NM, P.PROGRAM_NM, S.EVENT_DATE, S.EVENT_TIME, S.SESSION_NO FROM SESSION_PRICE SP INNER JOIN TICKET_TYPE TT ON SP.TYPE_ID = TT.TYPE_ID INNER JOIN SCHEDULE S ON SP.SCHEDULE_ID = S.SCHEDULE_ID LEFT JOIN PROGRAM P ON S.PROGRAM_ID = P.PROGRAM_ID WHERE SP.SPRICE_ID = #{spriceId}

SELECT SP.SPRICE_ID, SP.SCHEDULE_ID, SP.TYPE_ID, SP.PRICE, SP.USE_YN, SP.REG_DT, TT.TYPE_NM, P.PROGRAM_NM, S.EVENT_DATE, S.EVENT_TIME, S.SESSION_NO FROM SESSION_PRICE SP INNER JOIN TICKET_TYPE TT ON SP.TYPE_ID = TT.TYPE_ID INNER JOIN SCHEDULE S ON SP.SCHEDULE_ID = S.SCHEDULE_ID LEFT JOIN PROGRAM P ON S.PROGRAM_ID = P.PROGRAM_ID WHERE 1=1
AND SP.SCHEDULE_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND TT.TYPE_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
ORDER BY S.EVENT_DATE ASC, S.SESSION_NO ASC, TT.SORT_ORDER ASC OFFSET #{firstIndex} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{recordCountPerPage} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(*) totcnt FROM SESSION_PRICE SP INNER JOIN TICKET_TYPE TT ON SP.TYPE_ID = TT.TYPE_ID INNER JOIN SCHEDULE S ON SP.SCHEDULE_ID = S.SCHEDULE_ID WHERE 1=1
AND SP.SCHEDULE_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND TT.TYPE_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')

SELECT SP.SPRICE_ID, SP.SCHEDULE_ID, SP.TYPE_ID, SP.PRICE, SP.USE_YN, SP.REG_DT, TT.TYPE_NM, TT.SORT_ORDER FROM SESSION_PRICE SP INNER JOIN TICKET_TYPE TT ON SP.TYPE_ID = TT.TYPE_ID INNER JOIN SCHEDULE S ON SP.SCHEDULE_ID = S.SCHEDULE_ID WHERE SP.SCHEDULE_ID = #{scheduleId} AND SP.USE_YN = 'Y' AND (NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM PROGRAM_TICKET_TYPE PTT WHERE PTT.PROGRAM_ID = S.PROGRAM_ID) OR SP.TYPE_ID IN (SELECT PTT.TYPE_ID FROM PROGRAM_TICKET_TYPE PTT WHERE PTT.PROGRAM_ID = S.PROGRAM_ID)) ORDER BY TT.SORT_ORDER ASC
